concepts.title: Position of Point wrt Parabola
concepts.conceptBody:
The position of a point with respect to a parabola : 

Let $\text{P}\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ be a point in the plane if $\text{y}_{1}^{2}-4a{{x}_{1}}<0$ then the point $\text{P}$ lies inside the parabola ${{\text{y}}^{2}}=4\text{ax}$. If $\text{y}_{1}^{2}-4a{{\text{x}}_{1}}>0$ then the point $\text{P}$ lies outside the parabola.

The assertion can be easily proved. If $\text{P}\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ be any point within the parabola then produce the ordinate of $\text{P}$ to a point $\text{Q}\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},\text{y}_{1}^{\text{ }\!\!'\!\!\text{ }} \right)$ on the upper branch of the parabola.

We must have $\text{{y}'}{{~}_{1}}>\left| {{\text{y}}_{1}} \right|\Rightarrow \text{y}_{1}^{\text{ }\!\!'\!\!\text{ }2}>\text{y}_{1}^{2}$

Now, as $\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},\text{y}_{1}^{\text{ }\!\!'\!\!\text{ }} \right)$ lies on the parabola ${{\text{y}}^{2}}=4$ ax we have $\text{y}_{1}^{\text{ }\!\!'\!\!\text{ }2}=4\text{a}{{\text{x}}_{1}}$

Thus $4\text{a}{{\text{x}}_{1}}>\text{y}_{1}^{2}\Rightarrow \text{y}_{1}^{2}-4\text{a}{{\text{x}}_{1}}<0$

If $\text{P}\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ lies in the left half plane then ${{\text{x}}_{1}}<0$ and $\text{y}_{1}^{2}-4\text{a}{{\text{x}}_{1}}>0$ is obvious. If $\text{P}$ lies in the right half plane but does not lie within the parabola then $\left| {y}'{{~}_{1}} \right|<\left| {{y}_{1}} \right|$. which will reduce to $\text{y}_{1}^{2}-4\text{a}{{\text{x}}_{1}}>0$.

Note : 

  1. The point $\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ lies inside, on or outside ${{\text{y}}^{2}}=-4\text{ax}$ according as

$\text{y}_{1}^{2}+4\text{a}{{\text{x}}_{1}}<,\,=\,or>0$

     2. The point $\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ lies inside, on or outside ${{\text{x}}^{2}}=4$ ay according as

$\text{x}_{1}^{2}-4\text{a}{{\text{y}}_{1}}<,\,=,\,\,or>0$

     3. The point $\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ lies inside, on or outside ${{\text{x}}^{2}}=-4$ ay according as

$\text{x}_{1}^{2}+4\text{a}{{\text{y}}_{1}}<,\,=\,\,or>0$

examples.title: Vertex of the parabola $y^2+2 y+x=0$ lies in the quadrant
Which of the following points lie on the parabola $x^2=4$ ay
